'''mazhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whatness|whatness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whatness|whatness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mazhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhæwæth|mæzhæwæth]] || [[word:mæzhæwæj|mæzhæwæj]] || [[word:mæzhæwæsh|mæzhæwæsh]] || [[word:mæzhæwæ|mæzhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhazhawath|mazhazhawath]] || [[word:mazhazhawaj|mazhazhawaj]] || [[word:mazhazhawash|mazhazhawash]] || [[word:mazhazhawa|mazhazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhawath|mazhawath]] || [[word:mazhawaj|mazhawaj]] || [[word:mazhawash|mazhawash]] || [[word:mazhawa|mazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhafwath|mazhafwath]] || [[word:mazhafwaj|mazhafwaj]] || [[word:mazhafwash|mazhafwash]] || [[word:mazhafwaf|mazhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhawatha|mazhawatha]] || [[word:mazhawaja|mazhawaja]] || [[word:mazhawasha|mazhawasha]] || [[word:mazhawaka|mazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhawath|mazhawath]] || [[word:mazhawaj|mazhawaj]] || [[word:mazhawash|mazhawash]] || [[word:mazhawa|mazhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhawathal|mazhawathal]] || [[word:mazhawajal|mazhawajal]] || [[word:mazhawashal|mazhawashal]] || [[word:mazhawakal|mazhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhawathatha|mazhawathatha]] || [[word:mazhawajaja|mazhawajaja]] || [[word:mazhawashasha|mazhawashasha]] || [[word:mazhawaka|mazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhawathan|mazhawathan]] || [[word:mazhawajan|mazhawajan]] || [[word:mazhawashan|mazhawashan]] || [[word:mazhawakan|mazhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhawathaoro|mazhawathaoro]] || [[word:mazhawajaoro|mazhawajaoro]] || [[word:mazhawashaoro|mazhawashaoro]] || [[word:mazhawakaoro|mazhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
